title: Module 3: Security & Privacy Assessment Schema
description: Machine-readable audit framework for evaluating AI system security and data protection in AIS

evaluation_criteria.description: AI model weights, training data, and financial data encrypted at rest and in transit
evaluation_criteria.check_method: Analyze cloud security configurations, encryption settings, access logs
evaluation_criteria.pass_criteria: AES-256 encryption enabled, role-based access controls implemented, no unauthorized access in logs

required_settings.required_value: Hardware Security Module (HSM) or AWS KMS equivalent

evidence_required.analysis_required: No unauthorized access attempts succeeded in last 12 months

severity_mapping.justification: Inadequate financial data protection creates risk of unauthorized access, data breach, and financial statement manipulation

evaluation_criteria.description: AI systems tested against adversarial attacks and maintain accuracy under attack scenarios
evaluation_criteria.check_method: Review adversarial testing results, penetration testing reports, robustness validation
evaluation_criteria.pass_criteria: Adversarial attack testing passed, model accuracy degrades <10% under attack, attack detection mechanisms operational

evidence_required.testing_frequency: Annually minimum, after each major model update

severity_mapping.justification: Adversarial vulnerability enables attackers to manipulate AI financial decisions
severity_mapping.financial_impact: Fraudulent transactions may evade AI detection; credit scoring may be gamed

evaluation_criteria.criterion_name: Access Control and Segregation of Duties
evaluation_criteria.description: Role-based access controls for AI system administration with segregation of duties
evaluation_criteria.check_method: Review RBAC configuration, access matrices, segregation of duties documentation
evaluation_criteria.pass_criteria: RBAC implemented, no individual has end-to-end AI system control, periodic access reviews completed

segregation_requirements: Validator must be independent of developer
No single role has all permissions

severity_mapping.justification: Inadequate segregation of duties enables fraud or undetected errors in AI systems

aggregate_scoring.note: If S3.1 (Financial Data Protection) < 0.95, overall module fails

interdependency_triggers.trigger_condition: S3.1, S3.2, or S3.3 score < 0.7 (security vulnerability identified)
interdependency_triggers.action: Investigate governance root cause: Missing security policies? Inadequate training? Third-party risk management failure?
interdependency_triggers.classification_upgrade: Security finding may upgrade from Control Deficiency to Material Weakness if governance gap is systemic
